headline: KKR’s CEOs Bought 175,000 Shares While Retail Investors Fled
summary: One of the foremost financial companies in the world, shares of KKR (NYSE:KKR) are trading at $95.44 today, down 25.23% year-to-date and off 27.83% from its July 2025 peak. That decline sits alongside a Q4 earnings report that included record full-year Fee Related Earnings of $3.71 billion and $129 billion in new capital raised, the ...
